original_query:
SELECT MIN(t.title) AS movie_title
FROM keyword AS k,
     movie_info AS mi,
     movie_keyword AS mk,
     title AS t
WHERE k.keyword LIKE '%sequel%'
  AND mi.info IN ('Bulgaria')
  AND t.production_year > 2010
  AND t.id = mi.movie_id
  AND t.id = mk.movie_id
  AND mk.movie_id = mi.movie_id
  AND k.id = mk.keyword_id
executed_query:
EXPLAIN SELECT MIN(t.title) AS movie_title
FROM keyword AS k,
     movie_info AS mi,
     movie_keyword AS mk,
     title AS t
WHERE k.keyword LIKE '%sequel%'
  AND mi.info IN ('Bulgaria')
  AND t.production_year > 2010
  AND t.id = mi.movie_id
  AND t.id = mk.movie_id
  AND mk.movie_id = mi.movie_id
  AND k.id = mk.keyword_id
execution_plan: ->  Parallel Seq Scan on movie_info mi  (cost=0.00..239333.76 rows=162 width=4)
->  Parallel Seq Scan on movie_keyword mk  (cost=0.00..43329.71 rows=1884971 width=8)
->  Seq Scan on keyword k  (cost=0.00..2685.12 rows=13 width=4)
